subcategory: button component with variants and sizes
use_cases: Triggering actions in forms and interfaces
Accessible button interactions with focus states
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with proper accessibility attributes including focus-visible states, disabled handling, and asChild prop for polymorphic composition.
